chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 150 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.1927/2025. 13.10.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate and Mr. Jahanzeb Baloch, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Waheed Hussain Abro, ADC and Mr. Tariq Aziz, AC, SAPT. Learned counsel, under instructions of applicant, does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. SCRA stands disposed of. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
